creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Since a lot of people don't have this problem. I suggest you to move your 
~/.mozilla to ~/.mozilla-bak and try to run your Firefox in fresh of ~/.mozilla 
to see if you still have problem. If you don't then you will have to clean 
up your ~/.mozilla. If you do, then please follow this: 

http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html
